title: The Digital World and Future Innovation Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: To make someone feel worried or upset.
choices: agitate
converge
recognise
rounds.answer: agitate
rounds.explanation: agitate: To make someone feel worried or upset.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Able to do many different things or adapt to many situations.
choices: agitate
converge
versatile
rounds.answer: versatile
rounds.explanation: versatile: Able to do many different things or adapt to many situations.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Basic or simple; not fully developed.
choices: converge
rudimentary
agitate
rounds.answer: rudimentary
rounds.explanation: rudimentary: Basic or simple; not fully developed.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Able to do many different things or adapt to many situations.
rounds.answer: versatile

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: More bad than something else; of lower quality.
rounds.answer: worse

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: Able to do many different things or adapt to many situations.

Strange or unusual in a way that is interesting or different.
To get or gain something, usually by effort or learning.
rounds.answer: To get or gain something, usually by effort or learning.
rounds.explanation: She worked hard to acquire the coding skills she needed for the project.

rounds.target: The team conceived a clever plan to build a weather-monitoring app.

Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.

rounds.answer: The school's internet speed was barely adequate for video calls.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'fugitive' mean in this unit?
choices: A person who is running away from the police or trying to escape.
To make someone feel worried or upset.
To come together from different directions to meet at one point.
rounds.answer: A person who is running away from the police or trying to escape.
rounds.explanation: fugitive: A person who is running away from the police or trying to escape.

rounds.prompt: What does 'ease' mean in this unit?

rounds.answer: Noun: comfort or freedom from worry. Verb: to make something less difficult.
